problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
